violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed a box of ice cream cones stored on the floor. A soda bib was stored on the floor in the kitchen.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Observed a case of napkins stored on the floor in the kitchen.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed soda bibs stored on the floor in the kitchen.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
